description: A housekeeper finds a pair of glasses in a room after a guest has checked out.

nodes.task_description: The housekeeper brings the item to the housekeeping office.
The supervisor logs the item in the lost and found system, noting the item description, room number, and date found.

expected_outcome.value: A new entry is accurately created in the lost and found log.

nodes.task_description: The physical item is tagged with the log number and placed in secure storage.

expected_outcome.value: The item is properly tagged and stored according to policy.
